articles.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
articles.description: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.
